title: Badgers Colts squad for Western Province match
description: GEORGE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The Six Gun Grill Garden Route Badgers Colts will play against Western Province Colts at the University of the Western Cape Grounds in Cape Town this weekend.


> The three-day match runs from today, Thursday 21 November, to Saturday, with the one-day match taking place on Sunday.


These matches will include professional players like Ruan Terblanche, Hlompo Modimokoane and Lifa Ntanzi, who will return from injury. The promising 17-year-old Enathi Kitshini is also in the line-up for the weekend.

The squad of the Badgers for the weekend are: Mark Andrianatos, Ruan Terblanche, Brayton Plaatjies, Hayden Sweet (captain), Keenan Viera (wicketkeeper), Pheko Moletsane, Heath Richards, Hlompho Modimokoane, Enathi Kitshini. Reagon Rhode, Lifa Ntanzi, Elih Thorne and Tyrese Karelse.

Returning from injury, professional cricketer Ruan Terblanche will want to use this match to show that he is fit again. Photos: SWD Cricket

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
